channel.title: update hooks on Jacob Sanford
channel.description: Recent content in update hooks on Jacob Sanford

item.title: Drupal Custom Content Entities: Post-Module-Install Field Changes
item.description: At some point in their lifecycle, most custom Entities in Drupal will require structural changes. Schema evaluation and the provisioning of storage for a custom content Entity occurs automatically only once - when the module that defines that entity is installed. Conversely, a custom content Entity’s form structure, elements, and properties are read from the src/Entity/EntityName.php entity definition each time it is rendered. As a result, any schema-changing modifications after module installation will leave a Drupal instance in corrupted limbo: UI/form elements for the Entity no longer synchronized with the previously-installed storage definition.
